metaDescription: QM — industrial manufacturing in Armenia: full-cycle metalworking, CNC machine tools, export, leasing, and 24/7 support.
heroSubtitle: About us — industrial manufacturing in Armenia
storyLead: About us — industrial manufacturing in Armenia
storyParagraphs: QM is an Armenian manufacturing company founded in 1998 in Razdan. We specialize in industrial equipment and machine tools made in Armenia, combining engineering expertise, high precision, and modern technology.

Our production structure covers the full metalworking cycle: blanking, foundry, turning, milling, jig boring, grinding, heat treatment, and gear cutting, plus modern CNC equipment. That lets us keep industrial product quality stable and under control at every stage.

The site covers 3 hectares, with more than 20,000 m² of enclosed production space. Over 200 units of industrial equipment are in service, so we can run both serial production and custom metalworking jobs in Armenia.
Our products are supplied across Armenia and exported to Russia, Kazakhstan, Ukraine, the UAE, and Canada — evidence of the quality and reliability of our industrial machinery.
We keep investing in production, adopting new technology, and expanding partnerships, including flexible leasing options for customers and partners in Armenia.

values.title: Quality without compromise
values.body: Structured inspections, traceable components, and documented acceptance tests — so specifications are met before equipment leaves our floor.

values.title: Safety and compliance
values.body: Machinery is built to applicable standards with clear guarding, risk assessment support, and documentation for audits and insurance.

values.title: Honest timelines
values.body: We communicate realistic lead times and milestones. When constraints change, you hear from us early with options — not last-minute surprises.

values.title: Lifecycle support
values.body: Spare parts, remote diagnostics, and field service keep your assets productive for years after installation.

ctaBody: Share your application, materials, and targets — we will respond with a clear path forward.
